name: nexus-similarity-search-api

description_variants.claude: Ranks a list of JSON items by hybrid NMI+cosine similarity to a query item in a single stateless HTTP call, without embeddings, indexes, or setup — ideal for mixed datasets combining text, categorical, and numeric fields.
description_variants.gpt: Call this function to get ranked similarity results for mixed-type JSON items (text, categorical, numeric) using fused NMI and cosine scoring; returns ordered list with scores in one round-trip, no pre-computation required.
description_variants.gemini: Use this tool when you need to find the most similar items in a raw JSON collection to a reference item across heterogeneous field types; do NOT use if you already have dense vector embeddings or a persistent index — use a vector DB instead.

value_equivalent: $38 per hour of manual feature-engineering and ranking pipeline work avoided
invocation_examples: Find the 5 products most similar to this one given a catalog with mixed text descriptions, numeric prices, and categorical tags
Rank these 200 support tickets by similarity to an incoming ticket using subject text and categorical priority fields
Given a JSON list of job candidates with skills (categorical), years of experience (numeric), and bio (text), return the top 10 most similar to this reference profile
